meta.title: Kasher Word-of-Mouth Marketing Program
meta.description: Amplify your brand with custom QR-coded Kashers and a proven word-of-mouth marketing program. Drive traffic, boost loyalty, and increase sales.

hero.title: Amplify Your Brand Through Connection
hero.subtitle: Unleash the Power of Custom QR-Coded KASHERS & Our Word-of-Mouth Marketing Program
hero.description:
Are you tired of forgettable promotional products that don't move the needle? Searching for a strategy that builds real engagement, drives foot traffic, and sparks authentic word-of-mouth?
It's time to tap into the most powerful and trusted form of marketing—referrals and recommendations—with a truly unique tool:
Custom Branded KASHERS + QR-Coded Lighters, backed by our proven Word-of-Mouth Marketing Program add-on option.
This isn't swag—it's strategy. A Kasher tool with your logo, slipped onto a QR-coded lighter that sparks conversations and conversions.

whatIsIt.title: What Is a Custom Branded KASHER with QR Integration?
whatIsIt.description:
Picture a high-quality, patented Kasher multitool—laser-engraved with your logo—something your customers actually use every day: cleaning pipes and devices, packing joints or blunts, opening packages, and so much more.
Now, pair that with a custom BIC or Clipper lighter, featuring your branding and a QR code that instantly links to:
qrDestinations: A branded landing page designed for engagement
whatIsIt.modelsIntro: Choose from our lineup of high-impact models:
whatIsIt.modelsOutro: —all made to last and leave an impression.

howItWorks.title: The Word-of-Mouth Marketing Program
howItWorks.subtitle: Turn Every Lighter Into a Lead Generator
howItWorks.description: We've designed a complete ecosystem to help you turn this branded tool into a referral-generating machine. Here's how it works:

steps.title: Custom Products + QR Integration
steps.description: We co-create branded Kashers and QR-labeled BIC lighters with clear calls to action that lead directly to your digital presence and/or foot traffic to your store.

steps.title: Rewards & Referral System
steps.description:
Implement a digital punch card or tiered incentive structure with our help. Reward customers for:
- Repeat visits
- Purchases
- Sharing their QR code
- Referrals that convert
Offer perks like free products, discounts, VIP access, or loyalty tiers.

steps.title: Smart Distribution Tactics
steps.description:
Use branded Kashers + QR codes to boost ROI in creative, high-impact ways:
- Gift With Purchase (e.g. "Spend $50, get a FREE Kasher + lighter")
- Referral Bonuses (e.g. "Tag a friend, both get a Kasher!")
- Third Visit Gifts or First-Time Buyer Rewards
- Influencer Drops and Pop-Up Giveaways
- Event Swag and In-store Impulse Displays
- Double as a Concert or VIP ticket
The sky's the limit

steps.title: Email and SMS Automation
steps.description: We'll help you create automated email and sms sequences with drip campaigns that welcome new customers, track referrals, and keep your brand top-of-mind bringing customers back time and time again.

steps.title: Social Media + Review Boosting
steps.description:
Gamify engagement:
 "Give a Kasher, share a Kasher" or "Scan, Review, Win" campaigns drive reviews, user-generated-content, and local buzz.

benefits.title: Why It Works: The Benefits of This Program

items.title: Built-In Word-of-Mouth Power
items.description: The utility of a Kasher + the virality of QR codes creates natural conversation starters and trusted recommendations.

items.title: Unlimited Exposure – Online & Offline
items.description: Physical longevity meets digital connection—no repeat ad costs. Your brand lives in their pocket and on their screen.

items.title: Increased Loyalty & Repeat Business
items.description: The rewards program turns casual customers into long-term fans and frequent buyers.

items.title: Higher Foot Traffic & Engagement
items.description: Incentivized visits and referrals generate measurable in-store and online growth.

items.title: Data-Driven Insights
items.description: Track every scan. Learn what converts. Optimize your outreach based on real usage data.

items.title: Stand Out from Competitors
items.description: Break through the clutter with a product people want—and will ask for by name.

whoIsItFor.title: Who Is This For?
whoIsItFor.description: Our program is ideal for brands who want real traction without inflated ad spends:

points.text: Don't wait. Be first in your market to build a powerful referral loop and enhance your sales funnel.
Limited QR code designs and bonus incentives available for early adopters.
Competitors are already leveraging branded KASHERS—are you falling behind?
"People are asking for Kashers by name." This isn't just swag—it's demanded.
Request a Free Mock-Up. Let us show you the potential, no strings attached.
Our team has helped countless brands amplify retention and referrals through creative tools and tactical engagement systems. We're not guessing—we've got the blueprint.

successStories.name: Lionheart Dispensary
successStories.result: Noticed a 22% increase in repeat business within the first month. Average ticket size jumped by $6 per customer from people returning to redeem QR-based discounts.

successStories.name: High Mountain Dispensary
successStories.result: With zero paid ads, they brought in 48 new customers in just 3 weeks — all organically, through the people already shopping with them.

successStories.name: Lifted Supply
successStories.result: Used the program to move a large batch of slower-moving merch. They cleared out old stock by bundling in custom Kashers — without slashing prices — and ended up tripling their ROI on that inventory.

pricing.ctaMockup: Want to see your brand on a Kasher?
pricing.ctaStrategySubtext: and lock in your production slot today.

items.question: Is this costly?
items.answer: Not compared to traditional ads. Every item is a reusable brand ambassador, often costing less per impression than a single click.

items.question: What's the ROI?
items.answer: Loyalty + referrals = higher customer lifetime value. One shared Kasher can bring 3+ new customers and countless online impressions with linked social media campaigns like - "Get a Kasher, Share a Kasher".

items.question: Will people scan the QR code?
items.answer: Absolutely—when it leads to real value and Kasher has proven to be a natural conversation starter & therefore a walking billboard in your customer's pocket. And we help you craft irresistible landing pages, offers, and call-to-actions with the added Marketing plan option.

items.question: Why not just run ads?
items.answer: Ads interrupt. Word-of-mouth invites. Our strategy multiplies itself, with no recurring ad spend.
